**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Tianjin Rund Filter Co., Ltd. presents a clear profile of a heavily capitalized legacy manufacturing plant that has severely downsized its physical production to become an industrial landlord and dormant holding shell. Established in 1991 in Tianjin's Dongli District (with a former name 'Tianjin Haimeng Filter Co.'), it boasts a substantial paid-in capital of 28.35 Million RMB. Despite retaining its official classification as an 'Auto Parts Manufacturer' and maintaining an active corporate domain ('rdfilter.com'), the most critical operational data—recovered from a column shift—shows only 4 insured employees in 2024. This tiny workforce cannot sustain the mass production of 'various series of filters'. The inclusion of 'Leasing of self-owned housing' in its business scope confirms its true current state: it utilizes its significant legacy factory assets for rental income, while the 'Rund Group' likely manages brand/sales operations elsewhere.
